title: What is the active share of a mutual fund
summary: Active share measures how different a fund's portfolio is from its benchmark index, expressed as a percentage between 0% and 100%.

summary: Stretching a ₹35,000 monthly pension requires careful planning, especially in smaller cities like Lucknow and other similar urban areas. A structured budget, pre-built emergency savings, healthcare planning, and low-risk investments can help retirees manage expenses.
